posts.caption:
From a vibrant cobalt blue vase to a charming rooster salt & pepper set, a cozy milk glass fairy lamp, and a spice rack straight out of grandma’s kitchen. These finds are full of personality and nostalgia.

Some pieces make a statement. Some spark a memory. And some make you wonder how they ever survived all these years waiting to be discovered again.

Which one are you taking home? 👀

Hey guys, guess what? …… Chicken butt! 🐔🥚

Okay, now that we’ve got that out of the way, let’s talk about this adorable vintage hen napkin holder! Nestled inside are matching egg-shaped salt & pepper shakers, making this the perfect mix of farmhouse charm and kitchen whimsy.

Whether you’re a chicken collector, cottagecore enthusiast, or just someone who appreciates a good poultry pun, this little lady is ready to roost on your table.

🍀 For those lucky enough to find it

📚🌿 A little literary charm for your kitchen! 🌿📚

This vintage Westwood “Library Book” Spice Set turns everyday seasonings into a delightful display. Designed to look like a row of classic books, each spice jar is labeled as its own “volume” and rests neatly on its wooden shelf.

Perfect for:
✨ Cottage kitchens
✨ Vintage collectors
✨ Book lovers
✨ Unique housewarming gifts

Functional, whimsical, and full of nostalgic character, this charming set proves that even your spices deserve a place in the story!

📦✨ There’s something special about opening a package and discovering a little piece of history inside.

At Hiraeth Haven, every item is carefully wrapped and sent on its next journey, from our collection to your home. Whether it’s a vintage treasure, a timeless piece of glassware, or a nostalgic find that brings back memories, we love being part of that moment when the wrapping comes off.

What’s your favorite vintage treasure you’ve ever found?
